code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut n = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part_opt = parts.get(i)
    let part = match part_opt
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num_opt = string.parse_int(part)
    match num_opt
    when Some(x)
      if x > 0
        p = p + x
      else if x < 0
        n = n + x
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let r = p - n
  print("r=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
